title: Module 4.4: Nevada, New York, Texas & Washington
subtitle: Diverse State Regulatory Models
description: Examine four distinct state regulatory approaches: Nevada and Washington (notification-based), New York (comprehensive with training requirements), and Texas (comprehensive with industry engagement).
learning_objectives: Differentiate between notification-only and comprehensive regulatory models
Understand New York's unique training certification system (Class A/Class B)
Navigate Texas regulations including ILDA engagement history
Apply Washington's laser show notification requirements
Compare inspection programs across all four states
